name: Loan For Any Purpose
description_short: Loan For Any Purpose offers personal, installment, title, and payday loans from $250 to $50,000 at their Detroit location on Grand River Ave.
description_long:
Loan For Any Purpose is a multi-product consumer lender headquartered at 2197 Cheshire Bridge Rd NE, Atlanta, GA, with a Detroit branch located at 3403 Grand River Ave #200, MI 48208. The company operates extended hours—Monday through Friday 7am to 8pm and weekends 9am to 6pm—positioning itself as an accessible storefront lender for working adults who cannot visit during standard business hours.

The Detroit location offers seven distinct loan products: cash advances under $1,000, same-day loans with minimal documentation, title loans secured by vehicle title up to $50,000, payday loans up to $1,000, bad credit loans ranging from $250 to $50,000, unsecured installment loans between $1,000 and $5,000, and personal loans up to $50,000 for borrowers with higher credit scores. The range spans both secured and unsecured products, giving borrowers with different credit profiles and collateral situations multiple pathways to funding.

What sets Loan For Any Purpose apart operationally is its explicit acceptance of all credit types across most products—only the top-tier personal loan product notes that a higher credit score is recommended. Loan applications do not trigger a hard FICO inquiry; the company pulls from non-traditional consumer reporting agencies instead, preserving the applicant's credit score during the application process. Compliance disclosures are prominent and thorough, including USA PATRIOT Act identity verification procedures and clear language that their products are intended for short-term needs only.

Loan For Any Purpose fills a gap for Detroit borrowers who need same-day or next-day cash across a wide loan size range and have limited credit options. However, the fine print states that rates, terms, and product availability vary by state and applicant, qualification is not guaranteed, and the amounts funded may be lower than advertised maximums. Borrowers with persistent credit difficulties are explicitly directed to seek nonprofit credit counseling. This is a legitimate short-term and mid-range personal lending option, but borrowers should compare rates carefully before committing.
address: 2556 N Hollywood St a 1, Memphis, TN 38127

company_info.headquarters: 2556 N Hollywood St a 1, Memphis, TN 38127

pros: Accepts all credit types on most products including cash advance, same-day, title, payday, installment, and bad credit loans
Loan amounts span a wide range: $250 minimum up to $50,000 maximum
Applying does not affect your FICO score — uses non-traditional credit reporting agencies
Extended hours: weekdays 7am–8pm and weekends 9am–6pm at the Detroit branch
Same-day loan option with minimum documentation required
Multiple secured and unsecured product types under one roof
Accessibility support offered via dedicated phone line (470) 781-9223
cons: Rates, fees, and product availability are not disclosed on the website — vary by state and applicant
Loan amount received may be lower than the advertised maximum with no transparency on how decisions are made
Products are explicitly short-term solutions; not appropriate for ongoing or long-term borrowing needs
Verification of submitted information may add up to two business days to funding timeline for online applications
Personal loans up to $50,000 require a higher credit score, limiting the top tier to better-qualified borrowers
best_for: Borrowers with bad or thin credit needing $250–$5,000 quickly with no hard credit inquiry
Detroit-area residents needing same-day cash outside standard banking hours
Vehicle owners seeking title loans up to $50,000 against their car's equity
Consumers comparing multiple loan types (payday, installment, personal) and wanting one application point
diagnosis: Loan For Any Purpose is best for Detroit borrowers with limited credit history or bad credit who need fast access to cash between $250 and $5,000, or vehicle owners seeking title loans. The main caveat is that rates and actual approved amounts are not disclosed upfront, so borrowers should request a full rate quote before accepting any offer.
services: Cash advance loans (under $1,000, unsecured, all credit types)
Same-day loans (fast approval, minimum documents, unsecured)
Title loans (secured by vehicle title, up to $50,000)
Payday loans (up to $1,000, all credit types)
Bad credit loans ($250–$50,000, all credit types)
Installment loans ($1,000–$5,000, unsecured, all credit types)
Personal loans (up to $50,000, higher credit score recommended, unsecured)
In-store loan applications at Detroit Grand River Ave branch
Online loan applications with identity verification
Soft-pull credit review (no FICO score impact)
